suggested_titles.title: Coiled Horizon
suggested_titles.subtitle: An abstract contemporary painting features a deeply textured, vibrant turquoise and red-orange spiral unwinding from a dark core, anchored by a strong vertical plane.
suggested_titles.description: A deep, textured spiral form dominates the center-left, coiling outwards from a dark, recessed core. The composition organizes around this dynamic circular motion, balanced by a bold vertical turquoise band on the right. Thick impasto builds a tactile surface, showing granular reds and shimmering blues against a metallic bronze ground. This interplay of form and texture creates a potent, contemplative atmosphere of contained energy and profound depth. The work asserts its presence through material weight and structural tension.

suggested_titles.title: Luminous Depth
suggested_titles.subtitle: A contemporary abstract work presents intense, granular red-orange and vibrant turquoise impasto, creating a heavily worked surface that captures and reflects light.
suggested_titles.description: Layers of thick, granular pigment build a substantial surface across the canvas, showcasing a vibrant interplay of blue-green and red-orange. The material behavior is evident in the sculpted ridges and valleys, where light catches the peaks and shadows deepen the recesses. This rich texture defines the composition, allowing colors to shift with depth and light. The resulting atmosphere is one of profound material presence and silent, energetic contemplation. The surface holds both dynamic color and tactile weight.

suggested_titles.title: Tectonic Threshold
suggested_titles.subtitle: This structural abstract painting explores spatial relationships through a central, expanding spiral form intersected by a resolute vertical division in vibrant, contrasting hues.
suggested_titles.description: A prominent vertical blue-green block anchors the right side, cutting across the expansive spiral form that originates from the center. The composition organizes around this dynamic tension between the centrifugal spiral and the stabilizing vertical. Pigments are applied with robust impasto, creating defined territorial fields and a visibly worked surface. This structural arrangement generates a contemplative atmosphere of contained energy and visual order. The artwork creates a powerful sense of presence through its robust divisions and spatial pressure.

La obra de arte debe permanecer completamente visible, correctamente proporcionada, montada naturalmente en la pared y curatorialmente presente, sin aumentar su escala física real. Interpreta solo la obra de arte aproximadamente un 20% más pequeña dentro de la composición final que la tendencia por defecto del modelo, aumentando el aire de pared y entorno si es necesario, sin alterar la proporción física real entre la obra y la figura humana. Solo el entorno circundante, la figura humana, la iluminación, la pared, la arquitectura, el mobiliario y la atmósfera pueden ser generados o modificados.
